name: tool-proxy-automation
description: Production-ready multi-account browser automation with rotating proxies

scripts.build:app: set CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false&& electron-builder --win --dir && xcopy scripts dist\win-unpacked\scripts\ /E /I /Y && copy .env.example dist\win-unpacked\.env /Y
scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/accountManager.js && node --check src/browserSession.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/logger.js && node --check src/proxyManager.js && node --check src/stateStore.js && node --check public/script.js
